title: Use Enum.filter and Enum.reject instead of Enum.reduce for a parity split
prompt: Given MyApp.Accumulators.group_by_parity/1 from test_fixtures/enum_reduce_awkward.ex, rewrite it as `%{evens: Enum.filter(list, &(rem(&1, 2) == 0)), odds: Enum.reject(list, &(rem(&1, 2) == 0))}`. Do not use `Enum.reduce`. Output a single-function module `defmodule MyApp.Accumulators do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Direct function replacement; no judgment about which Enum function to pick — filter/reject is the canonical choice for parity.
